title: Un uomo a metà
writer: Vittorio De Seta, Fabio Carpi, Vera Gherarducci
actors: Jacques Perrin, Lea Padovani, Ilaria Occhini
plot: Michele, a young intellectual, enters an existential crisis when, without realizing it, his conception of life comes into conflict with collective morality. The result is a serious neurosis that detaches him from life, from work, ...
